title: Repair adhesive bonded structural damage on vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair adhesive bonded structural damage on vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair adhesive bonded structural damage

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s required bonding and repair procedures 1.3 Select and prepare adhesive specifications, application instructions and bonding materials1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check adhesive application tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify adhesive bonding methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s required bonding and repair procedures 1.3 Select and prepare adhesive specifications, application instructions and bonding materials1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check adhesive application tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify adhesive bonding methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s required bonding and repair procedures 1.3 Select and prepare adhesive specifications, application instructions and bonding materials1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check adhesive application tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify adhesive bonding methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair adhesive bonded structural damage

elements.title: Remove and replace bonded sections

pcs.text: Check replacement panels and components against vehicle specifications and for quality2.2 Remove bonded panels and structures according to OEM procedures and without causing damage to system or components2.3 Repair bonded panels and structures according to OEM procedures and store until required2.4 Refit bonded panels and structures using approved bonding methods, adhesives, materials and equipment according to OEM or authorised agency specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Select and apply sealants according to OEM or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures2.6 Clean bonded panels and structures without causing damage to systems or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check replacement panels and components against vehicle specifications and for quality2.2 Remove bonded panels and structures according to OEM procedures and without causing damage to system or components2.3 Repair bonded panels and structures according to OEM procedures and store until required2.4 Refit bonded panels and structures using approved bonding methods, adhesives, materials and equipment according to OEM or authorised agency specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Select and apply sealants according to OEM or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures2.6 Clean bonded panels and structures without causing damage to systems or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check replacement panels and components against vehicle specifications and for quality2.2 Remove bonded panels and structures according to OEM procedures and without causing damage to system or components2.3 Repair bonded panels and structures according to OEM procedures and store until required2.4 Refit bonded panels and structures using approved bonding methods, adhesives, materials and equipment according to OEM or authorised agency specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Select and apply sealants according to OEM or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures2.6 Clean bonded panels and structures without causing damage to systems or components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove and replace bonded sections

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
